title: spondias lutea var. dubia
intro: Spondias lutea var. dubia, also known as yellow mombin, is a variety of the Spondias lutea plant, a species of tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Spondias lutea var. dubia include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, regulate blood sugar levels, and protect against certain types of cancer. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions.
